tree.text: How to make tomato and egg noodles

children.text: First, wash the tomatoes and cut them into small pieces.
children.cn: 首先，把西红柿洗净并切成小块。
children.notes: wash: 清洗; cut... into...: 把……切成……; small pieces: 小块
children.statement: “cut them into” 意为“把它们切成”。
children.explanation: cut... into... 是固定词组，表示将某物切成某种形状或状态，此处 them 指代 tomatoes。
children.keywords: First, wash, tomatoes, cut, small pieces

children.text: At the same time, wash some green vegetables and put them aside.
children.cn: 同时，洗一些绿叶蔬菜并把它们放在一边备用。
children.notes: At the same time: 同时，与此同时; green vegetables: 绿叶蔬菜; put aside: 搁置，把……放在一边备用
children.statement: “put aside” 在这里意为“丢弃，扔掉”。
children.explanation: “put aside” 在这里的意思是“放在一边备用”，以便之后烹饪时加入，而不是扔掉。
children.keywords: same time, wash, green vegetables, put aside

children.text: Next, pour some cooking oil into a pot and heat it.
children.cn: 接下来，倒一些食用油进锅里并加热它。
children.notes: Next: 接下来; pour: 倾倒; cooking oil: 食用油; pot: 锅; heat: 加热
children.explanation: cooking（烹饪）+ oil（油）组合在一起即为食用油、烹调油。
children.keywords: Next, pour, cooking oil, pot, heat

children.text: Stir-fry the tomatoes with a little salt, and add three to four bowls of hot water after one minute.
children.cn: 加入少许盐翻炒西红柿，一分钟后加入三到四碗热水。
children.notes: Stir-fry: 翻炒; a little: 少许; salt: 盐; hot water: 热水
children.statement: 西红柿需要和少许盐一起翻炒。
children.explanation: 句子中写着“Stir-fry the tomatoes with a little salt”，表示翻炒西红柿并加少许盐。
children.keywords: Stir-fry, tomatoes, salt, add, hot water

children.text: When the water boils, beat the eggs into the pot, put in the noodles, and stir for three minutes.
children.cn: 当水烧开时，把鸡蛋打入锅中，放入面条，并搅拌三分钟。
children.notes: When: 当……时; boils: 沸腾，烧开; beat eggs: 打鸡蛋; noodles: 面条; stir: 搅拌，搅动
children.statement: 水没开之前就可以放入面条了。
children.explanation: 句子中明确说明“When the water boils... put in the noodles”（当水烧开时……放入面条），所以应当在水开后放面条。
children.keywords: boils, beat eggs, noodles, stir, three minutes

children.text: Finally, add the green vegetables and some more salt, and boil everything for another three minutes.
children.cn: 最后，加入绿叶蔬菜和更多的盐，再煮三分钟即可。
children.notes: Finally: 最后; add: 增加，添加; some more: 更多一些; another three minutes: 另外三分钟
children.explanation: another three minutes 表示在原有的三分钟基础上，“再”煮三分钟。
children.keywords: Finally, add, vegetables, salt, boil, another

tree.text: How to make tomato and egg noodles

children.text: First of all, you need to wash the fresh tomatoes thoroughly before cutting them into small pieces.
children.cn: 首先，在把新鲜的西红柿切成小块之前，你需要彻底清洗它们。
children.notes: First of all: 首先; thoroughly: 彻底地; before doing: 在做某事之前; small pieces: 小块
children.statement: “thoroughly” 在这里是副词，用来修饰动词 “wash”。
children.explanation: thoroughly 是副词，意为“彻底地、完全地”，在句中作状语修饰动词 wash。
children.keywords: First of all, wash, fresh tomatoes, thoroughly, cutting, small pieces

children.text: Meanwhile, prepare the green vegetables by washing them and putting them aside for later use.
children.cn: 同时，通过清洗绿叶蔬菜并把它们放在一边来准备好它们以备后用。
children.notes: Meanwhile: 与此同时; by doing: 通过做某事（表示方式）; for later use: 留作后用
children.statement: “Meanwhile” 意为“与此同时”，在句中用作副词来承上启下。
children.explanation: Meanwhile 是一个过渡词，意为“在此期间，与此同时”，用作副词，起到连接两个同时发生动作的作用。
children.keywords: Meanwhile, prepare, vegetables, washing, putting aside, later use

children.text: Next, pour an appropriate amount of cooking oil into a pot and heat it over medium heat.
children.cn: 接下来，倒入适量的食用油到锅里，用中火加热。
children.notes: appropriate amount of: 适量的; medium heat: 中火
children.explanation: appropriate 是形容词，意为“适当的，合适的”，an appropriate amount of 意为适量的。
children.keywords: Next, pour, appropriate amount, cooking oil, pot, heat, medium

children.text: Stir-fry the sliced tomatoes with a pinch of salt, and then pour in three to four bowls of hot water after one minute.
children.cn: 将切好的西红柿加入少许盐翻炒，一分钟后倒入三到四碗热水。
children.notes: sliced tomatoes: 切成片的/切好的西红柿; pinch of salt: 一小撮盐; pour in: 倒进，注入
children.statement: “a pinch of salt” 意为“一大袋盐”。
children.explanation: “a pinch of salt” 意为“一小撮盐/少许盐”，表示分量非常少。
children.keywords: Stir-fry, sliced tomatoes, pinch of salt, pour in, hot water

children.text: Once the water begins to boil, beat the eggs directly into the pot, add the noodles, and stir them gently for three minutes to prevent sticking.
children.cn: 水一旦开始沸腾，直接把鸡蛋打入锅中，加入面条，轻轻搅拌三分钟以防粘锅。
children.notes: Once: 一旦（引导时间/条件状语从句）; directly: 直接地; gently: 轻轻地; to prevent sticking: 动词不定式短语作目的状语，意为“防止粘连”
children.statement: 句中的 “to prevent sticking” 是动词不定式短语作目的状语。
children.explanation: 动词不定式 to prevent... 在这里表示做前面“搅拌”这个动作的目的，意为“为了防止粘连”。
children.keywords: Once, boil, beat eggs, directly, noodles, stir gently, prevent sticking

children.text: Finally, toss in the green vegetables and a little more salt, boiling the soup for another three minutes until everything is perfectly cooked.
children.cn: 最后，扔进绿叶蔬菜和再加一点点盐，再煮三分钟直到所有东西都完全煮熟。
children.notes: toss in: 扔进，投入; boiling: 煮（现在分词作伴随状语）; until: 直到……时; perfectly cooked: 完美煮熟
children.statement: “boiling” 在这里是现在分词形式，作伴随状语。
children.explanation: boiling the soup... 作伴随状语，修饰主句的动作，表示伴随着“扔进蔬菜和盐”的同时，继续煮汤三分钟。
children.keywords: Finally, toss in, vegetables, salt, boiling, another, cooked
